title: Element Resources Hydrogen Plant Gets $1.85B Green Light
content: Element Resources hydrogen plant plans are moving ahead in California, where the company is investing $1.85 billion to develop North Americaâ€™s largest green hydrogen production facility. The Lancaster Clean Energy Center (LCEC), located just north of Los Angeles, will combine on-site solar power and battery storage to enable 24/7 hydrogen production without relying on the electricity grid or external water sources.
author: Analysts Account
